content: {"key_findings": ["Round 1 yielded only 2 readable pages, both effectively irrelevant: one physical-activity systematic review (off-topic) and one captcha-blocked umbrella review (no content retrieved).", "No substantive intermittent fasting (IF) evidence has been captured yet; the perspective-coverage metric (8/9) is misleading because it counts scheduled coverage, not read content.", "Search query drift: new result titles about commercial determinants of health, cost-effectiveness analysis, and corporate wellness indicate query modifiers diluted the IF focus.", "No numeric IF findings (weight change, glycemic control, cardiovascular, adverse events) are in the knowledge pool yet.", "Zero studies on IF-specific outcomes, mechanisms, or populations have been read."], "perspective_gaps": ["Scientific", "Public_Health", "Emerging_Trends", "Regional", "Historical", "Methodological"], "web_queries": ["intermittent fasting randomized controlled trial weight loss outcomes", "time-restricted eating glycemic control HbA1c meta-analysis", "alternate-day fasting cardiovascular risk LDL blood pressure trial", "intermittent fasting adverse events safety hypoglycemia muscle loss", "16:8 time-restricted feeding body composition insulin sensitivity RCT", "intermittent fasting long-term sustainability adherence dropout rate"], "academic_queries": ["intermittent fasting cardiometabolic outcomes systematic review", "time-restricted eating randomized trial metabolic health", "alternate-day fasting safety adverse events clinical trial"], "exa_queries": ["most recent high-quality evidence on intermittent fasting health outcomes 2023 2024"], "convergence_assessment": "expanding", "should_continue": true, "reasoning": "We have read 2 pages and neither contributes IF-specific evidence. The search correctly retrieved many URLs but the RELEVANT pages have not been fetched/read. Round 1 yielded poor SNR: too much economics/commercial-determinants noise from the prior queries. Next round must use tighter biomedical queries (RCT, time-restricted eating, alternate-day fasting) to surface IF-specific trials and systematic reviews. Cannot converge until core IF trial and review evidence is in the knowledge pool.", "knowledge_gaps": ["Does 16:8 time-restricted eating improve glycemic control in adults with prediabetes or T2D?", "What is the magnitude of weight loss effect of alternate-day fasting vs continuous energy restriction in randomized trials?", "What adverse events (hypoglycemia, lean mass loss, eating-disorder risk) are reported in IF trials?", "Does IF improve cardiovascular biomarkers (LDL, triglycerides, blood pressure) independently of weight loss?", "What is adherence and dropout rate in IF interventions over 12+ months?", "Do women vs men show different metabolic responses to IF?", "Are the reported IF benefits sustained at 24+ month follow-up, or do they regress like most weight-loss interventions?", "What mechanisms (autophagy, circadian alignment, caloric restriction equivalence) explain observed IF effects?"]}
